name: makepad-2.0-troubleshooting
description: | CRITICAL: Use for Makepad 2.0 troubleshooting and common mistakes. Triggers on: makepad error, makepad bug, makepad problem, makepad issue, makepad not working, text invisible, widget not showing, click not working, height zero, makepad pitfall, makepad gotcha, makepad FAQ, makepad help, script_mod error, compile error, widget not found, render not updating, hot reload not working, wasm build error, port conflict, server lock, IME popup, selection handle, popup window crash, canvas splash, POS
author: ZhangHanDong
summary_zh: 专为Makepad 2.0打造的排错指南，能帮你快速解决界面渲染异常、编译报错或热重载失效等日常开发踩坑问题。
